heading: Canadian rail lines
label: 55116 Canadian rail lines
text: does not apply to the transportation of merchandise between points in the continental United States, including Alaska, over through routes in part over Canadian rail lines and connecting water facilities if the routes are recognized by the Surface Transportation Board and rate tariffs for the routes have been filed with the Board.Section 55102 of this title
